name: OpenClaw
description: AI agent platform and conversation orchestrator. Controls WhatsApp, Telegram, and workspace agent dispatch.
notes: UI port 48950. WebSocket port 18789. Control API port 48950.

name: n8n
description: Workflow automation platform. Hosts 39 AI agent workflows plus system webhooks, cron jobs, and queue processors.
notes: Internal port 5678 mapped to host 32769. Admin: admin@iamvisioncorp.org

name: PostgreSQL AIDB
description: Primary relational database. Stores model_usage_log, trade_signals, trade_executions, platform_task, alert_event, sched_job, and all workspace tables.
notes: External port 32770. DB name: AIDB. n8n credential ID: SwbG9UjrENs6DHXW

name: Caddy Reverse Proxy
description: TLS-terminating reverse proxy for all public-facing services. Routes *.vizionai.iamvisioncorp.org subdomains.
notes: Config: /etc/caddy/Caddyfile. Terminates TLS for openclaw, n8n, api, mt5, nn subdomains.

name: MT5 Demo Terminal
description: MetaTrader 5 demo account terminal running in Docker with Wine. Hosts rpyc server for Python automation and EA execution.
notes: VNC web UI port 3000. rpyc port 18812. docker exec -u abc for Wine commands.

name: MT5 Live Terminal
description: MetaTrader 5 live account terminal running in Docker with Wine. Hosts rpyc server for Python automation and EA execution.
notes: VNC web UI port 3001. rpyc port 18812. docker exec -u abc for Wine commands.

name: MT5 Copytrade
description: ZeroMQ-based copy trade relay: Demo (PUB) -> Bridge (SUB) -> Copytrade (DEALER) -> Live MT5.

name: MT5 REST Server
description: REST API bridge to MT5 rpyc servers. Provides /health, /trade, /account endpoints consumed by n8n EA Gateway workflow.
notes: Systemd service on host. Bridges n8n -> rpyc -> Wine MT5.

name: NN Server
description: Neural network inference server for trading signal analysis. Provides prediction endpoints consumed by trading agents.

name: EA AI Gateway
description: n8n workflow that acts as an AI-powered gateway for Expert Advisor requests. Handles ping, validate_trade, get_briefing, get_session, get_news_bias, report_trade, watchlist_status.
notes: Workflow ID: 6VeJRjTNrrxCQK8u. Model: gemini-2.5-flash-lite. HTTP 422 = n8n transient (advisory mode).

name: Trade Trigger Webhook
description: Entry point webhook for trade execution pipeline. Receives trade signals and routes to Risk Checker then Trading Executor.
notes: Simple path format (no workflowId prefix) — registered via UI.

name: Alert Ingest Webhook
description: Receives structured alert events from all workspaces. Writes to alert_event table via native Postgres node.
notes: Workflow: wf_alert_ingest_webhook (UHmCR6VzI876gb75). Uses native Postgres executeQuery node.

name: Infisical (Secrets)
description: Centralized secrets manager. Infrastructure project: 918f6641. Business project: f67a6490. All service tokens, API keys, and credentials stored here.
notes: Provisioner identity: bc08fecf. Runtime-read identity: 7e46b7dd. Executor identity: 089a3de4.

name: OpenRouter
description: AI model routing gateway. Routes requests to Claude, Llama, GLM and other models. Used as fallback when direct Gemini unavailable.
notes: n8n credential ID: 9a8L86PX0yHKHdfY. NOTE: 402 errors when account has no credits — use Gemini direct as primary.

name: Gemini API (Google)
description: Primary LLM provider for all AI agents. Used directly via openAiApi-compatible endpoint. Primary model: gemini-2.5-flash-lite.
notes: n8n credential ID: GJSyeDqYqXZ3DZjE. OpenClaw uses auto-detected google/* models from GEMINI_API_KEY env var.

name: Telegram Bot
description: Primary Telegram bot for operator notifications, daily cost reports, and interactive agent access. Long polling mode.
notes: Bot token: 8408221035:AAH... User @iam_vizion (ID: 8195552085) allowlisted. Daily cost report at 23:55 UTC.

name: WhatsApp (OpenClaw Channel)
description: WhatsApp channel managed by OpenClaw. Long John Silver test client on 7373934343. Business API via OpenClaw channel plugin.
notes: Client LONGJOHNSILVER primary WA: 7373934343. OpenClaw config: /docker/openclaw-xbkt/data/.openclaw/openclaw.json
